title: Meningococcal Disease in the Democratic Republic of the Congo
summary: There is an outbreak of meningococcal disease in the Mangembo Health Zone of Kongo Central Province. The best way to protect yourself is to get meningococcal vaccination.

title: Yellow Fever in Venezuela
summary: An increased number of cases of yellow fever have been reported throughout Venezuela.

title: Chikungunya in Mayotte
summary: There is an outbreak of chikungunya in Mayotte. You can protect yourself by preventing mosquito bites.

title: Middle East respiratory syndrome coronavirus – Global update
summary: Since the beginning of 2025, 19 cases of MERS-CoV including four deaths have been reported globally. 17 from Saudi Arabia, two travel-associated cases from France.

title: Rabies in Morocco
summary: A case of rabies has been reported in a traveler from Morocco. Travelers potentially exposed to rabies should immediately seek medical care.

title: Rocky Mountain Spotted Fever in Mexico
summary: Illness and death due to RMSF have been reported in northern Mexico along the U.S. border, particularly in Baja California, Sonora, Chihuahua, Coahuila, and Nuevo León.

title: Rift Valley Fever in Mauritania and Senegal
summary: There are outbreaks of Rift Valley fever (RVF) in Mauritania and Senegal.

title: West Nile virus infection – ECDC Update
summary: Since the beginning of 2025, 14 European countries have reported human cases of West Nile virus infection: Albania, Bulgaria, Croatia, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Italy, Kosovo, North Macedonia, Romania, Serbia, Slovakia, and Spain.
